overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dark fantasy game (Elden Ring) showing a player character wearing a distinctive fur cloak traversing a ruined gothic castle. The character moves from a dark stone corridor into an open plaza beneath a dramatic burning red sky, ascends stairs to a cathedral entrance, and enters a candle-lit interior hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone corridor with wall-mounted lanterns

events.description: approaching the end of the corridor with bright light visible through the archway
exiting the dark corridor into bright light revealing the burning red sky

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow stone corridor toward the illuminated exit

entered.detail: rough dark stone brick wall forming the left side of the corridor
warm orange wall-mounted lantern casting light on the stone
large stone archway leading to the brightly lit exterior
wooden plank ramp leaning against the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dark stone corridor illuminated by warm wall-mounted lanterns. The rough brick walls create an enclosed feeling as the character approaches a bright archway exit ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined castle plaza under burning apocalyptic sky

events.description: the burning red sky becomes fully visible, revealing the apocalyptic atmosphere
character continues walking straight through the open plaza toward a distant archway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the open ruined plaza toward a stone archway in the distance

entered.detail: dramatic red and orange burning sky filled with embers and floating debris
tall crumbling stone walls and towers of the ruined castle
large gothic cathedral with spires visible in the distance
patches of dry yellow grass growing between stone pavement

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a vast open plaza beneath a dramatic burning red sky. Ruined stone walls and towers line the sides while a large gothic cathedral looms in the distance. The ground is covered with stone pavement and patches of dry grass.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase leading to gothic cathedral entrance

events.description: beginning to ascend the stone stairs toward the cathedral entrance
reaching the top of the stairs and approaching the cathedral entrance platform

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs toward the large gothic cathedral entrance

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up to the cathedral entrance
tall red fabric banners hanging beside the entrance
ornate stone balconies and buttresses on the cathedral facade

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide stone staircase flanked by high walls, approaching the imposing gothic cathedral entrance. Red banners hang beside the doorway as the building looms larger, filling the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark gothic cathedral nave with candlelight

events.description: entering the dark interior of the cathedral through the large doorway
dramatic shift from bright burning sky to dim candle-lit interior

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark entrance hall and proceeding down the candle-lit nave

entered.detail: vast dark interior hall with high vaulted ceilings
tall stone columns lining the sides of the nave
tall stained glass windows at the far end of the hall
wall-mounted candles providing warm orange light

segments.scene_description: The character enters the dark cathedral interior, leaving the burning sky behind. The vast nave is illuminated by candle sconces along the walls, with tall stone columns lining the path toward distant stained glass windows at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic stone corridor into a vast, apocalyptic exterior before concluding within a solemn cathedral interior. It begins by following the character through a narrow, dark passage lit by warm lanterns, moving steadily toward a bright archway. As the character emerges from the tunnel, the scene opens into a wide plaza beneath a dramatic burning red sky, where ruined towers and dry grass stretch toward a looming gothic cathedral. The camera then ascends a wide stone staircase flanked by high walls and red banners, drawing closer until the imposing entrance fills the frame. Finally, the view shifts from the fiery light of the outdoors into the dim, candle-lit nave of the cathedral, where tall stone columns lead the way toward distant stained glass windows.
